docs.title: Welcome to geoPythonInfoTree
docs.text:
A list of Python tools, libraries, and resources categorized particularly for geospatial applications.

This repo is an informative tool to display and store brief explanations for geospatial python libraries and essential tools of Python.

docs.title: Feedback
docs.text: Please feel free to inform me about the broken links, outdated libraries or new sources which appear on the GeoPythonTree repository. -Murat Kendir- Feedback Form

docs.title: Tables
docs.text:
Here you will find lists of some useful sources:

  • Geospatial Python Libraries
  • Python (e)Books
  • Python Online Resources
  • Python Editors / IDE's
  • Python Interpreters / Compilers / Implementations
  • Python SDKs (or APIs)
  • Python GUI Libraries
